questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: At what time between 1 O'clock and 2 O'clock will the hands of the clock be together?

solutions.solution:
Method I
At 1 O'clock, hour hand is at 1 while minute hand is at 12. It means, the two hands are 5 min spaces apart.
To be together, minute hand will have to gain 5 min over the hour hand.
Since 55 min are gained in 60 min
∴ 5 min will be gained in 60/55 × 5 = 60/11 min or 5 5/11 min
Hence, the two hands will coincide at 5 5/11 min past 1.

Method II
In the given question, x = t, (x + 1) = 2
∴ Required answer = 60x/11 min past 1
= 60 × 1/11 min past 1
= 5 5/11 min past 1
